user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the HR budget planner module, so that I can control whether budget planning is available in the system
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the hr budget planner module?"; Then my selection is captured

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my HR budget planner configuration, so that the module setting is persisted
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen an option for the HR budget planner module; When I click Save; Then the configuration is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel changes on the Setup screen, so that I can discard unsaved edits to the budget planner setting
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
